text: Committee Report: Standing Committee on Finance, Report #67 (2024). Chairman: Jayant Sinha. Topic: Digital Lending and Fintech Regulation. Recommended RBI oversight of digital lending apps, interest rate caps, and consumer protection framework.

Committee Report: Standing Committee on Defence, Report #54 (2024). Chairman: Radha Mohan Singh. Topic: Defence Procurement. Recommended faster indigenous manufacturing, reduced import dependence to 30%, and DPP reforms.

Committee Report: Standing Committee on Health, Report #143 (2023). Chairman: Ram Gopal Yadav. Topic: Healthcare Infrastructure gaps. Recommended increasing health budget to 3% of GDP, 1 PHC per 30,000 population, and more medical colleges.

Committee Report: Public Accounts Committee, Report #98 (2023). Chairman: Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury. PAC examined CAG audit of PM-KISAN. Found ₹1,364 crore disbursed to ineligible beneficiaries. Recommended Aadhaar-based verification.

Committee Report: JPC on Waqf Amendment Bill (2024). Chairman: Jagdambika Pal. Examined Waqf (Amendment) Bill 2024. Received representations from Muslim organizations. Report submitted with recommendations on property documentation.

Committee Report: Standing Committee on Education, Report #35 (2024). Topic: NEP 2020 Implementation. Recommended faster adoption of 5+3+3+4 structure, mother-tongue instruction, and digital infrastructure in rural schools.

Committee Report: Estimates Committee, Report #21 (2023). Topic: Smart Cities Mission review. Found 29 of 100 cities behind schedule. Recommended timeline extensions, better fund utilization monitoring, and private sector engagement.

Committee Report: Standing Committee on IT, Report #28 (2024). Chairman: Prataprao Jadhav. Topic: Artificial Intelligence regulation framework for India. Recommended sector-specific AI guidelines, ethical AI standards, and AI safety board.
